title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: We're going to talk about English in 10 years.
I'm going to talk about English today.

title: can / could / be able to
examples: This can cause some problems too because there's some like swear words that are really similar.

title: have to / must
examples: yeah you kind of have to swallow the end.

title: would (habit/conditional)
examples: A good tip that I would say is A-W.
I would just say number two correctly.
